annotations\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport shutil\nimport subprocess\nimport sys\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Any\n\n\nROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\nFRONTEND_APPS = [\n    Path(\"apps/admin-dashboard\"),\n    Path(\"apps/integration-console\"),\n    Path(\"apps/patient-portal\"),\n    Path(\"apps/provider-portal\"),\n    Path(\"apps/public-website\"),\n]\nREQUIRED_DIRS = [\n    Path(\"apps\"),\n    Path(\"services\"),\n    Path(\"packages\"),\n    Path(\"scripts\"),\n    Path(\"database\"),\n    Path(\"database/migrations\"),\n    Path(\"infrastructure/docker\"),\n    Path(\"infrastructure/helm\"),\n    Path(\"infrastructure/kubernetes\"),\n]\nSKIP_PARTS = {\n    \".git\",\n    \".pytest_cache\",\n    \"__pycache__\",\n    \"build\",\n    \"coverage\",\n    \"dist\",\n    \"node_modules\",\n}\n\n\ndef display(path: Path) -> str:\n    return path.relative_to(ROOT).as_posix()\n\n\ndef run(command: list[str], cwd: Path = ROOT) -> None:\n    location = display(cwd) if cwd != ROOT else \".\"\n    print(f\"+ ({location}) {' '.join(command)}\")\n    subprocess.run(command, cwd=cwd, check=True)\n\n\ndef skip(message: str) -> None:\n    print(f\"skip: {message}\")\n\n\ndef has_tool(name: str) -> bool:\n    return shutil.which(name) is not None\n\n\ndef should_skip_path(path: Path) -> bool:\n    return any(part in SKIP_PARTS for part in path.parts)\n\n\ndef require_file(path: Path) -> None:\n    if not (ROOT / path).is_file():\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"required file is missing: {path.as_posix()}\")\n\n\ndef require_dir(path: Path) -> None:\n    if not (ROOT / path).is_dir():\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"required directory is missing: {path.as_posix()}\")\n\n\ndef verify_project_layout() -> None:\n    for path in REQUIRED_DIRS:\n        require_dir(path)\n    for app in FRONTEND_APPS:\n        require_dir(app)\n        require_file(app / \"package.json\")\n        require_file(app / \"package-lock.json\")\n        require_file(app / \"tsconfig.json\")\n require_file(Path(\"docker-compose.yml\"))\n    print(\"verified required project directories and frontend lockfiles\")\n\n\ndef validate_json() -> None:\n    count = 0\n    for path in ROOT.rglob(\"*.json\"):\n        if should_skip_path(path):\n            continue\n        with path.open(encoding=\"utf-8\") as handle:\n            json.load(handle)\n        count += 1\n    print(f\"validated {count} json files\")\n\n\ndef is_helm_template(path: Path) -> bool:\n    if \"templates\" not in path.parts:\n        return False\n    return any((parent / \"Chart.yaml\").is_file() for parent in path.parents)\n\n\ndef load_yaml(path: Path) -> Any:\n    import yaml\n\n    with path.open(encoding=\"utf-8\") as handle:\n        return yaml.safe_load(handle)\n\n\ndef validate_yaml() -> None:\n    try:\n        import yaml  # noqa: F401\n    except Exception as exc:\n        skip(f\"yaml validation requires PyYAML ({exc})\")\n        return\n\n    count = 0\n    skipped_templates = 0\n    for pattern in (\"*.yaml\", \"*.yml\"):\n        for path in ROOT.rglob(pattern):\n            if should_skip_path(path):\n                continue\n            if is_helm_template(path):\n                skipped_templates += 1\n                continue\n            load_yaml(path)\n            count += 1\n    print(\n        f\"validated {count} non-template yaml files \"\n        f\"({skipped_templates} helm templates skipped)\"\n    )\n\n\ndef run_services() -> None:\n    for app in sorted((ROOT / \"services\").glob(\"*/app.py\")):\n        run([sys.executable, str(app)])\n\n\ndef run_frontends() -> None:\n    run([\"npm\", \"test\"])\n    run([\"npm\", \"run\", \"build\"])\n\n\ndef verify_go_sdk() -> None:\n    sdk_dir = ROOT / \"packages/sdk-go\"\n    require_dir(Path(\"packages/sdk-go\"))\n    require_file(Path(\"packages/sdk-go/go.mod\"))\n    if not has_tool(\"go\"):\n        skip(\"go sdk tests require go\")\n        return\n    run([\"go\", \"test\", \"./...\"], cwd=sdk_dir)\n\n\ndef verify_helm() -> None:\n    chart_dirs = sorted(path.parent for path in ROOT.rglob(\"Chart.yaml\"))\n    if not chart_dirs:\n        raise FileNotFoundError(\"no Helm Chart.yaml files found\")\n\n    for chart_dir in chart_dirs:\n        chart = load_yaml(chart_dir / \"Chart.yaml\")\n        if not isinstance(chart, dict):\n            raise ValueError(f\"{display(chart_dir / 'Chart.yaml')} must be a mapping\")\n        for key in (\"apiVersion\", \"name\", \"version\"):\n            if not chart.get(key):\n                raise ValueError(f\"{display(chart_dir / 'Chart.yaml')} missing {key}\")\n    print(f\"validated {len(chart_dirs)} helm chart metadata files\")\n\n    if not has_tool(\"helm\"):\n        skip(\"helm lint requires helm\")\n        return\n    for chart_dir in chart_dirs:\n        run([\"helm\", \"lint\", str(chart_dir)])\n\n\ndef verify_database() -> None:\n    require_file(Path(\"database/schema.sql\"))\n    migrations = sorted((ROOT / \"database/migrations\").glob(\"*.sql\"))\n    if not migrations:\n        raise FileNotFoundError(\"database/migrations has no sql migrations\")\n    print(f\"verified database schema and {len(migrations)} migration files are present\")\n\n    database_url = os.environ.get(\"HEALTHBRIDGE_VERIFY_DATABASE_URL\")\n    if not database_url:\n        skip(\"psql schema load requires HEALTHBRIDGE_VERIFY_DATABASE_URL\")\n        return\n    if not has_tool(\"psql\"):\n        skip(\"psql schema load requires psql\")\n        return\n    run(\n        [\n            \"psql\",\n            database_url,\n            \"--set\",\n            \"ON_ERROR_STOP=1\",\n            \"--file\",\n            str(ROOT / \"database/schema.sql\"),\n        ]\n    )\n\n\ndef verify_docker_inputs() -> None:\n    dockerfiles = sorted((ROOT / \"services\").glob(\"*/Dockerfile\"))\n    if not dockerfiles:\n        raise FileNotFoundError(\"no service Dockerfiles found\")\n    for dockerfile in dockerfiles:\n        if not (dockerfile.parent / \"app.py\").is_file():\n            raise FileNotFoundError(\n                f\"{display(dockerfile)} has no adjacent app.py build input\"\n            )\n    require_file(Path(\"docker-compose.yml\"))\n    print(f\"verified docker build inputs for {len(dockerfiles)} services\")\n\n    if not has_tool(\"docker\"):\n        skip(\"docker compose config requires docker\")\n        return\n    try:\n        run([\"docker\", \"compose\", \"config\", \"--quiet\"])\n    except subprocess.CalledProcessError:\n        skip(\"docker compose config unavailable or docker daemon is not reachable\")\n\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    verify_project_layout()\n    run([sys.executable, \"-m\", \"compileall\", \"-q\", \"services\", \"packages\",
